title: Hancock Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This model of Chicago’s Hancock Tower captures the unmistakable tapering form and cross-brace structure that make it one of the city’s most recognisable landmarks. The real tower stands 457m including the antennas, giving you a clean set of display sizes that fit well alongside your other skyscrapers.

Choose a scale that suits your current collection — you don’t need to go huge to make an impact.

title: Festive Skyscraper Collection – 3D Printed Architectural Models with Interchangeable Christmas Hat
description:
Give your display a seasonal lift with this limited-edition festive skyline collection. Each landmark tower is printed with crisp architectural detail and includes a removable Santa hat top that slots neatly onto the building. When the holidays are over, switch back to the standard top section and enjoy the model all year round.

This series includes nine iconic skyscrapers, each available in 1:1000 scale (and 1:1200 for the tallest buildings):

Empire State Building ( 1:1000 → ~38.1 cm )
Chrysler Building ( 1:1000 → ~31.9 cm )
Merdeka 118 ( 1:1500 → ~45.3 cm )
Willis Tower ( 1:1000 → ~44.2 cm )
The Gherkin ( 1:1000 → ~18.0 cm )
Lotte World Tower ( 1:1200 → ~46.2 cm )
Q1 Tower ( 1:1000 → ~32.3 cm )
Burj Khalifa ( 1:1600 → ~51.8 cm )
Shanghai Tower ( 1:1500 → ~42.1 cm )

Perfect for collectors, architecture fans, and anyone who loves a playful twist on premium display pieces. With customer photos enabled, you can get an even better feel for the size, finish, and personality these models bring to a shelf, desk, or festive layout.

title: World Trade Center (Twin Towers) – 3D Printed Pair Model
description:
This 3D-printed World Trade Center Twin Towers set is offered as a matched architectural pair and makes a strong, balanced display piece. The North Tower antenna is included, however all scale variations are calculated to roof height only so sizes remain consistent across options.

Real-World Reference

North Tower (WTC 1)
Roof height: 417 m
Antenna adds: +110 m (total 527 m)

South Tower (WTC 2)
Roof height: 415 m
No antenna

Important note:
The antenna is included on the model, but it is not included in the scale calculations. All listed sizes below refer to roof height only. The antenna simply adds extra height on top of the stated dimensions.

title: Merdeka 118 – Shiny multi colour - 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This * shiny * 3D-printed model of the 678.9m Merdeka 118 – the second-tallest building in the world – is a bold and modern addition to any skyline collection. Its sharp, faceted design and incredible height give it a commanding presence whether displayed on a desk or shelf.

Printed using silk PLA, this model has a smooth, reflective finish that enhances the tower’s clean lines and geometric form. The subtle shine catches the light beautifully, making it stand out from standard matte prints.

When printed at 1:1000 scale, it stands approximately 67.9 cm tall, creating an impressive centrepiece without overwhelming your display. Choose a size that fits your current collection – going larger means keeping future models at that same scale.

Each model is produced in high detail to capture the distinctive angles and structure that make Merdeka 118 so unique. Ideal for collectors, architecture enthusiasts, or anyone looking for a standout display piece.

title: New York City Times Square Skyline– 3D Printed Cityscape Model
description:
Bring a piece of New York into your home with this highly detailed 3D-printed model of Times Square and the surrounding Midtown skyscrapers. The design captures the dense city blocks, tall towers, and layered skyline that makes this part of Manhattan so iconic.

This model makes a striking display for any shelf, desk, or coffee table, and is perfect for architecture enthusiasts, NYC lovers, or anyone who wants a little reminder of the city that never sleeps. The intricate print brings out the character of Times Square, from its tightly packed streets to the soaring towers that define the skyline.

The detail level means each print takes just over a day to complete, but the result is a stunning miniature cityscape you’ll enjoy for years.

title: Chrysler Building – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This highly detailed 3D-printed model of the Chrysler Building in New York City captures the elegance of its Art Deco crown and iconic spire. 

A must-have for collectors of architectural models, it makes a standout display piece whether placed on a shelf, desk, or alongside other landmarks.

title: 432 Park Avenue – Full Colour 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This full colour 3D-printed model of 432 Park Avenue captures the tower’s clean symmetry and distinctive square window grid in striking detail. Finished with Ice Blue windows and a White main structure, this version brings the building to life and adds a more realistic architectural presence to your display.

At 425.5 metres tall in real life, the proportions translate beautifully into display scale.

title: Goldin Finance 117 – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
The Goldin Finance 117, rising 597 metres above Tianjin, is one of China’s most ambitious architectural designs — though the real one never quite reached completion.
This 3D-printed model, however, finally gives us a finished version!

Beautifully detailed and precisely printed, it captures the tower’s elegant, tapering form — perfect for collectors, architects, and skyline enthusiasts.

When printed at 1:1000 scale, it stands 59.7 cm tall — an impressive display piece that fits perfectly alongside other world skyscrapers.

title: Gevora Hotel – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This detailed model of the 356 m Gevora Hotel brings one of Dubai’s most striking towers into your display space. Its crisp lines and elegant taper make it a superb centrepiece, and with several scales available you can pick a size that fits your current setup — staying consistent helps keep future additions balanced.

Each piece is printed with care for clean edges and smooth surfaces, making it ideal for collectors, desk décor or architectural fans.

title: Merdeka 118 – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of the 678.9m Merdeka 118 – the second-tallest building in the world – is a striking addition to any skyline collection. With its sleek, faceted design and towering height, it brings a powerful architectural presence to your shelf or desk.

Printed in high detail, this model captures the tower’s dramatic lines and bold presence. Whether you're a collector, architecture enthusiast, or just want an eye-catching centrepiece, this is the one to display with pride.

Pick a scale that fits your collection – remember, going big means you’ll need to stay big for future models!

title: Princess Tower Dubai - 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
Bring one of Dubai’s most distinctive skyscrapers into your home with this stunning 3D-printed model of the Princess Tower. Soaring at 414 metres, this elegant residential tower is a perfect centrepiece for collectors of modern architecture or Dubai cityscapes.

Meticulously designed to capture the intricate silhouette and spire of the real tower, this scale model is printed with precision and care.

title: Lotte World Tower – Multi-Colour 3D Printed Skyscraper Model | Architectural Display
description:
This 3D-printed model of the iconic 555m Lotte World Tower is now available in a stunning multi-colour version, perfect for collectors, architecture fans, and display enthusiasts. The layering of colours adds vibrancy and depth, making the model even more eye-catching and realistic.

if you would like tweaks to what is coloured please do ask and I will add your varation so you can order it .

title: The Gherkin - 3D Printed Model
description:
Bring the stunning curves and elegance of London's famous Gherkin into your home or office with this high-quality 3D-printed model. A perfect display piece for collectors, architecture enthusiasts, or anyone who loves the London skyline.

Real Building Height: 180 meters

Carefully printed with a Bambu Lab HD2 or Bambu Lab P1S using premium Bambu PLA

title: Jin Mao Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description: Bring a piece of Shanghai into your home with this detailed 3D-printed model of the Jin Mao Tower. At 420.5 meters tall in real life, this elegant skyscraper is a must-have centerpiece for any architecture enthusiast or model collector.

title: Shanghai Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This beautifully detailed 3D-printed model of the Shanghai Tower captures the smooth twisting form of China’s tallest skyscraper. At 632 meters in real life, it’s the second tallest building in the world – and now it can stand proudly in your collection.

Whether you're an architecture fan or just love iconic skylines, this model makes a bold yet elegant statement. Choose a scale that fits your display space – and your future collection plans!

title: One World Trade Center – 3D Printed Model Skyscraper
description: This striking 3D-printed model of the One World Trade Center captures the bold architectural beauty of New York’s tallest skyscraper. Standing at 541.3 meters (1,776 ft) in real life, it’s an iconic centerpiece for any skyline collection or a standalone display that makes a statement.

title: Burj Khalifa – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of the iconic 828m Burj Khalifa is a breathtaking centrepiece for any skyline collection.

With its sleek tapering design and detailed base structure, it captures the soaring elegance of the tallest building in the world. Whether you're a fan of modern architecture or building your own miniature skyline, this model makes a stunning impression.

title: Shanghai World Financial Center – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of the iconic Shanghai World Financial Center is a stunning centerpiece for any collection.

Standing at 492 meters in real life, this modern skyscraper towers with its signature trapezoid aperture near the peak. Whether you're into architecture, cityscapes, or simply love collecting epic landmarks, this one delivers.

title: Oriental Pearl Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description: This striking model of the Oriental Pearl Tower captures the elegance and bold design of Shanghai’s skyline centerpiece. The real tower stands at 468 meters, and this detailed 3D print showcases its unique spheres and slender spire beautifully – a stunning centerpiece for any architecture lover or travel enthusiast.

title: Willis Tower – Full-Colour  3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This stunning 3D-printed model of the Willis Tower (formerly Sears Tower) captures the entire height including the white spire – all 527 metres of it in real life. It’s a full-colour print that showcases the dramatic contrast and style of Chicago’s most iconic skyscraper.

Each model includes:
	•	A deep black frame
	•	Bronze-toned windows
	•	A sharply detailed white spire that completes its commanding silhouette

It’s the magic of the Bambu HD2 that makes this full-colour finish possible at this price.

title: Empire State Building - 3D Printed Skyscraper
description: Bring a piece of New York City into your home with this detailed 3D-printed model of the iconic Empire State Building, based on its real height of 443.2m (antenna included). Whether you’re building a skyline collection or just love Art Deco architecture, this is a stunning and timeless piece.

title: San Francisco Downtown Skyline – Detailed 3D Printed City Section Model ( This is zoomed in )
description:
Experience San Francisco’s iconic skyline in miniature with this finely detailed 3D printed model of the downtown core. Created from real GIS and topographic mapping data, this piece captures the soaring skyscrapers and dense urban texture that define the city’s heart — from the waterfront to the Financial District.

Every building is individually modelled and printed in high-resolution, showcasing the depth and scale of the city’s most recognisable structures. Whether displayed on a shelf, framed on a wall, or used as a design reference, this model brings a tactile sense of the city to your space.

Perfect for architecture enthusiasts, collectors, or anyone who loves San Francisco, this piece blends precision mapping with modern design.

title: San Francisco Downtown – 3D Printed City Map ( This is zoomed out )
description:
San Francisco Downtown – 3D Printed City Map

Capture the energy and precision of San Francisco with this intricately 3D-printed city map. Every street, block, and landmark has been recreated from real-world topographic and GIS mapping data, giving it an authentic and highly detailed layout that perfectly reflects the city’s structure.

Each map section is printed with fine resolution, bringing San Francisco’s unique grid and waterfront to life — ideal as wall art, a desk display, or a collector’s piece for architecture and design enthusiasts.

title: Chrysler Building – Fulll colour- 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
Bring New York’s Art Deco masterpiece into your collection with this full-colour 3D printed model of the Chrysler Building. Standing tall with its distinctive stainless-steel crown and elegant spire, this piece captures the unique contrast between the light grey facade and the shimmering silver highlights that make the building world-famous.

The model is carefully finished in Light Gray for the main structure and Silver for the crown, spire, and window details, recreating the authentic look of the real skyscraper. This extra detailing makes the Chrysler Building a true centrepiece — whether displayed on a desk, bookshelf, or as part of a growing skyline collection.

Bring New York’s Art Deco masterpiece into your collection with this full-colour 3D printed model of the Chrysler Building. Standing tall with its distinctive stainless-steel crown and elegant spire, this piece captures the unique contrast between the light grey facade and the shimmering silver highlights that make the building world-famous.

The model is carefully finished in Light Gray for the main structure and Silver for the crown, spire, and window details, recreating the authentic look of the real skyscraper. This extra detailing makes the Chrysler Building a true centrepiece — whether displayed on a desk, bookshelf, or as part of a growing skyline collection.

The model stands at 31.9 cm tall, accurately representing the Chrysler Building at 1:1000 scale.

title: One World Trade Center – Full Colour - 3D Printed Model Skyscraper
description: This striking full-colour 3D-printed model of One World Trade Center highlights the tower’s bold, modern design with enhanced visual realism. The main structure features a translucent blue finish that echoes the building’s glass façade, shifting to an ice-blue tone at the base for added depth. Crisp white and grey detailing completes the look, giving the spire and architectural accents a clean, authentic feel. Standing at 541.3 meters (1,776 ft) in real life, the original building dominates the New York skyline — and this model makes an equally impressive statement as a centrepiece or standalone display.

title: St. Peter’s Basilica (Facade) – Vatican City | 3D Printed Landmark
description:
This 3D-printed model of the St. Peter’s Basilica facade captures the breathtaking architecture of one of the most iconic religious sites in the world. Featuring its grand columns, intricate statues, and signature central clock, this piece is a perfect addition to any architecture collection or spiritual space.

This model represents the full 48-meter front elevation of the basilica — including the rooftop statues and clock — and is scaled to suit different display needs. Whether you’re commemorating a visit to Rome or curating a world landmarks shelf, this piece brings classical elegance to your home or office.

This model is 18cm at its widest which is about 1:500 scale.

title: 3D Printed Jeddah Tower Model – Architectural Display
description:
This 3D-printed model of the 1,000-metre Jeddah Tower captures the sweeping taper and ultra-slender silhouette of what is set to become the world’s first kilometre-tall skyscraper. Even at smaller scales, the tower’s distinctive aerodynamic shape stands out as a clean architectural display piece.

At 1:1000 scale, the model reaches 100 cm tall, making it a commanding centrepiece. Smaller scales give you flexibility to match your current skyline collection without overwhelming your space.

title: Petronas Twin Towers – 3D Printed
description:
This 3D-printed model of the Petronas Twin Towers captures one of the world’s most recognisable skylines in striking detail. With two identical towers and the iconic skybridge, this is a substantial, weighty print that stands out immediately in any architectural display.

Because this model consists of two full towers plus the connecting bridge, it uses significantly more material and print time than a single-tower build. Pricing reflects that — this is a premium display piece, not a lightweight ornament.

The real Petronas Twin Towers stand 452 metres tall. Sizes below are calculated accurately from that height.

title: Canary Wharf – 3D Printed City Map
description:
This 3D-printed map of Canary Wharf captures the sharp geometry of London’s financial district in a bold, modern relief style. Buildings rise cleanly from the surface, waterways are clearly defined, and roads cut crisp lines through the layout. It works equally well as a display piece, office decor, or a thoughtful gift for architecture and London fans.

Unlike scale skyscraper models, this piece is not tied to a specific scale. It’s designed as a balanced wall or desk display that focuses on layout and presence rather than height comparison.

Size
	•	25 cm x 18 cm
	•	Low-profile relief with raised buildings for depth and shadow
	•	Lightweight and easy to mount or frame

Why this piece works
	•	Recognisable Canary Wharf layout with strong visual contrast
	•	Compact enough for shelves, desks, or gallery walls
	•	Clean architectural look that suits modern interiors
	•	A great standalone piece without committing to large-scale city models

title: Shanghai Skyline Bundle – 1:2000 Scale
description:
Bring the modern skyline of Shanghai to life with this stunning 3D-printed bundle, showcasing four of its most iconic architectural landmarks. Scaled to 1:2000, this set strikes the perfect balance between compact size and eye-catching detail.

Included in the set:

Jin Mao Tower (420.5m) – 21cm tall -with its tiered, pagoda-inspired form.

Oriental Pearl Tower (468m) –23cm tall instantly recognisable with its spheres and space-age design.

Shanghai World Financial Center (492m) 24cm tall – clean lines and a dramatic sky portal.

Shanghai Tower (632m) – 31cm tall - a beautifully twisting, futuristic form.

At this scale, the tallest model (Shanghai Tower) stands around 31.6 cm tall, giving a clear sense of scale without overpowering your space. Whether you’re adding to a growing architectural collection or looking for a sleek, minimalist display, this set fits perfectly on shelves, desks, or window sills.

Why this bundle? Each model has been carefully recreated to reflect the distinctive style and character of the original tower. Grouped together, they don’t just look good – they tell a story of modern engineering and design from one of the world’s most vibrant cities. It’s a great gift, conversation piece, or collector’s item.

Prefer something larger? Each building is also available individually in bigger scales like 1:1200, 1:1000, and 1:800 – ideal if you want to showcase one tower in greater detail or match your existing skyline setup.

title: Wrigley Field Stadium –  3D Printed  Model
description:
This model captures the form and layout of Wrigley Field in a clean architectural style. The structure is printed entirely in light grey, giving it a uniform, sculpted appearance that emphasises the geometry of the stands, tiers and exterior walls. The field is finished in green with a light-brown infield to add subtle, realistic contrast.

The full footprint measures 184 × 182 mm, making it a compact and display-friendly piece for desks, shelves or studio spaces. The proportions follow the real stadium closely, giving it a balanced architectural look without adding unnecessary detail.

A modern, crisp interpretation of one of Chicago’s most recognisable landmarks.

title: Q1 Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of the Q1 Tower – the tallest building in Australia – makes a striking centrepiece for any collection. Standing at 322.5 metres in real life, the 1:1000 scale version comes in at 32.25cm tall, giving you serious presence without taking over your shelf.

📸 The version in the photo is printed using a semi-transparent material with white sections at the top – it catches the light in a really unique way. It takes longer to produce due to the material and multi-part printing process, so it’s priced a little higher – but it looks seriously cool.

title: 3D Printed Spare Parts – Custom Replacement Pieces
description:
How it works

Use the personalisation box to clearly state:

  * What the spare is for
  * Which part you need
  * Original scale 

I’ll confirm feasibility, sizing, and finish before proceeding.
personalization_instructions: Before purchasing, please message me to confirm availability and sizing. I don’t keep slicer settings for every model, as these are often adjusted depending on the printer and build plate used.

title: China Zun (CITIC Tower) – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of China Zun (CITIC Tower), Beijing captures the bold, flared form of China’s tallest building. At 528 m in real life, this is a substantial model even at smaller scales, making it a strong centrepiece without overwhelming your display.

China Zun’s tapering silhouette means scale choice really matters here. Going larger gives you presence fast, but choosing a scale that fits with your existing collection will save you having to upscale everything else later.

title: London Skyline Bundle – 3D-Printed Architectural Models
description:
Capture the essence of London’s skyline with this beautifully detailed 3D-printed bundle. Featuring four of the city’s most iconic landmarks, this set is carefully scaled at 1:1200 to balance impressive presence with easy display.

Included in the bundle:

The Shard (310m) – 25.8 cm tall
London’s tallest and most striking skyscraper.

30 St Mary Axe (The Gherkin) (180m) – 15 cm tall
Instantly recognisable with its smooth, rounded form.

20 Fenchurch Street (Walkie-Talkie) (160m) – 13.3 cm tall
Known for its bold, curved design.

Elizabeth Tower (Big Ben) (96m) – 8 cm tall
A timeless symbol of London’s historic heart.

Printed in a crisp, striking white, these models stand out beautifully — giving a clean, architectural feel that highlights every detail, from the sleek lines of The Shard to the ornate features of Big Ben.

Prefer to build your skyline at your own pace?
All models are also available individually in larger scales like 1:1000, 1:800, and 1:600, perfect for creating a statement piece or matching existing collections.

Whether you’re a London enthusiast, architecture lover, or looking for a unique gift, this set is a perfect way to bring one of the world's greatest cities into your home.

Printed using a Bambu Lab HD2 printer for high-definition accuracy and finish, using premium Bambu brand PLA filament for consistent quality and durability.

title: Lotus Temple – Decorative Display Piece | 3D Printed
description:
This 3D-printed model is inspired by the world-famous Lotus Temple in Delhi, India. Designed with elegant geometric symmetry, it makes for a beautiful display piece on a shelf, desk, or as part of a cultural collection.

The piece measures approximately 13cm across (as shown against the ruler) and features a crisp lotus dome rising from an ornate star-shaped base.

Perfect as a conversation piece, gift, or to add architectural flair to your home.

title: Taipei 101 – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed model of the 508m tall Taipei 101 is a striking centrepiece for any skyline collection. Its iconic tiered pagoda design and tuned mass damper make it instantly recognizable and a favourite among skyscraper fans.

At 1:1000 scale, the model stands an impressive 50.8 cm tall – a bold yet manageable size for display. Consider which scale best suits your current setup:

title: Walkie Talkie Building in multi colour - 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
Bring a piece of London’s skyline into your home with this stunning 3D-printed model of the Walkie Talkie building (20 Fenchurch Street). At 1:1000 scale, this model stands an impressive 16 cm tall, capturing the tower’s iconic top-heavy silhouette and sweeping curves with precision.

This version is printed in three carefully chosen colours:
🔹 Ice Blue – for the glass curtain wall
⚪ White – highlighting the architectural ribs
⚫ Black – roof detailing

Whether you're starting a new skyline or adding to an existing collection, this model fits perfectly at 1:1000 scale — ideal for collectors who want consistency across their display.

title: The Shard – 3D Printed Model
description:
This detailed 3D-printed model of The Shard, one of London’s most iconic skyscrapers, makes an incredible centerpiece for your collection or a thoughtful gift for architecture enthusiasts.

Quality & Materials
Printed with care on high-precision Bambu Lab HD2/ P1S printers, using Bambu PLA

title: Miniature Shanghai – 3D Printed Cityscape Model
description:
This 3D-printed model brings the heart of Shanghai to life in stunning detail. You’ll instantly recognise the towering Shanghai Tower, the spiralling form of Jin Mao, and the sharp, iconic cut of the Shanghai World Financial Center—all faithfully recreated alongside the forest of high-rises that define Pudong.

Across the river, the historic Bund stands proud, echoing the contrast between the city’s past and future. The semi-translucent blue water of the Huangpu curves between them, adding depth and realism that catches the light beautifully from any angle.

Whether you're a fan of architecture, a collector of cities, or someone who just loves Shanghai—this piece makes a bold, elegant statement on any shelf or desk.

Printed to order. Designed to be admired.

title: St. Peter’s Basilica & Square – 3D Printed Model
description:
This highly detailed 3D-printed model of St. Peter’s Basilica and Square captures the grandeur of one of the world’s most iconic architectural landmarks. From the sweeping colonnades to the majestic dome, every curve and column is faithfully reproduced.

Available in multiple scales:

1:800 scale – approx. 16 cm tall × 46 cm long 
1:600 scale – approx. 21 cm tall × 60 cm long 
1:500 scale – approx. 26 cm tall × 74 cm long 

Whether you’re a lover of classical architecture, a collector of miniature landmarks, or searching for a unique gift, this piece will make an unforgettable display.

title: Lotte World Tower – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description: This 3D-printed model of the 555m Lotte World Tower is a stunning display piece or a great start to your collection. When printed at 1:1000 scale, it stands 55cm tall. Pick a size that matchings your current display, don't just go big as you will then need to go big for future models.

title: Flatiron Building – 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This elegant 3D-printed model of New York’s Flatiron Building captures the iconic triangular silhouette that has made it one of the city’s most photographed landmarks. Completed in 1902 and standing 86.9 m (285 ft) tall, the Flatiron remains a symbol of early skyscraper innovation and timeless design.

Available in multiple scales to suit your collection or display

title: The Gherkin in colour - 3D Printed Model
description: This 3D-printed model of The Gherkin, London, in striking multi-colour is a true conversation starter. At a scale of 1:1000, it stands 18 cm tall—perfect for your desk, shelf, or mantel.

title: Shanghai World Financial Center – Full Colour - 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
This 3D-printed full colour model of the iconic Shanghai World Financial Center is a stunning centerpiece for any collection.

Standing at 492 meters in real life, this modern skyscraper towers with its signature trapezoid aperture near the peak. Whether you're into architecture, cityscapes, or simply love collecting epic landmarks, this one delivers.

title: Walkie Talkie Building - 3D Printed Skyscraper Model
description:
Bring a piece of London’s skyline into your home with this highly detailed 3D-printed model of the iconic Walkie Talkie building (20 Fenchurch Street). Famous for its unique, top-heavy design, the real building stands at 160 metres tall — and we've captured its curves beautifully in this miniature!

Choose a scale that fits your growing skyline collection! Remember, once you go big, you might want your future models to match — it's often better to pick a consistent scale like 1:1200 or 1:1000 for an expanding cityscape.

Printed with care on high-precision Bambu Lab HD2/ P1S printers, using Bambu PLA

title: Leadenhall Building - 3D Printed - Full Colour Model
description:
This vibrant full-colour 3D print of the iconic Leadenhall Building (a.k.a. the “Cheesegrater”) is a standout piece for any architecture enthusiast or collector. At 225 metres in real life, this model stands 22.5cm tall when printed at 1:1000 scale – a perfect height for shelf or desktop display without dominating your collection.

Each model is printed in full colour, giving it a striking level of detail and realism. Unlike single-colour versions, this model captures the essence of the original building with an eye-catching finish.

Price: £68.00
(Reflects full-colour material cost and increased print time/chance of failed print)
